creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
(Re)Build of mail/p5-Mail-Mbox-MessageParser (r383942) on FreeBSD 8 (r281256) was started as ...

  portmaster --no-confirm -H -D mail/p5-Mail-Mbox-MessageParser


... but build stalls while waiting for input (as noticed in the log file) for the port to set/use paths to various compression commands. After blindly pressing "Return" (in effect, accepting the found paths as is), build proceeds.

Given the options to portmaster, there should not be a need for manual intervention in this case.
